scenarios.name: hil_gps_denied_navigation
scenarios.description: Software HIL navigation loop with GPS denied and VIO/TDOA fallback.

scenarios.name: hil_sensor_dropout
scenarios.description: Software HIL sensor dropout with degraded localization and recovery.

scenarios.name: hil_telemetry_delay
scenarios.description: Software HIL delayed telemetry link with recovery to nominal backend state.

scenarios.name: hil_packet_loss
scenarios.description: Software HIL packet loss forcing degraded then recovered communication state.

scenarios.name: hil_estimator_degradation
scenarios.description: Software HIL estimator degradation with emergency fallback and recovery.

notes: Software HIL validation complete. Physical flight validation remains future work.
This harness simulates deterministic sensor, telemetry, and command behavior against the live Go control-plane backend.
